## What problem does this solve?
Describe the SOC workflow or investigation task this would help with.

## Proposed Solution
What should the feature do? How should it work?

## Alternatives Considered
Any other approaches you've thought about.

## Additional Context
Links, references, example APIs, or any other relevant info.
